verses.text: An angel shows 'the great whore that sitteth upon many waters,' with whom kings committed fornication. The harlot. A great corrupt power has seduced the nations.
An angel shows 'the great whore that sitteth upon many waters,' with whom kings committed fornication. The harlot. A great corrupt power has seduced the nations.
She sits on a scarlet beast, decked in gold, named 'MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS.' Gaudy and vile. Her splendour hides her abominations.
She sits on a scarlet beast, decked in gold, named 'MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS.' Gaudy and vile. Her splendour hides her abominations.
She sits on a scarlet beast, decked in gold, named 'MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS.' Gaudy and vile. Her splendour hides her abominations.
She is 'drunken with the blood of the saints'; the beast 'was, and is not,' and shall go 'into perdition.' Blood-drunk. The persecuting power is doomed to destruction.
She is 'drunken with the blood of the saints'; the beast 'was, and is not,' and shall go 'into perdition.' Blood-drunk. The persecuting power is doomed to destruction.
She is 'drunken with the blood of the saints'; the beast 'was, and is not,' and shall go 'into perdition.' Blood-drunk. The persecuting power is doomed to destruction.
The seven heads are seven mountains and seven kings; the beast is 'the eighth, and... goeth into perdition.' Explained. The vision's symbols point to doom.
The seven heads are seven mountains and seven kings; the beast is 'the eighth, and... goeth into perdition.' Explained. The vision's symbols point to doom.
The seven heads are seven mountains and seven kings; the beast is 'the eighth, and... goeth into perdition.' Explained. The vision's symbols point to doom.
Ten kings give power to the beast and 'make war with the Lamb,' but 'the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords.' Lamb conquers. Christ defeats every hostile power.
Ten kings give power to the beast and 'make war with the Lamb,' but 'the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords.' Lamb conquers. Christ defeats every hostile power.
Ten kings give power to the beast and 'make war with the Lamb,' but 'the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords.' Lamb conquers. Christ defeats every hostile power.
The waters are peoples; the ten horns and beast shall 'hate the whore,' make her desolate, and burn her. Turned on her. The wicked devour their own.
The waters are peoples; the ten horns and beast shall 'hate the whore,' make her desolate, and burn her. Turned on her. The wicked devour their own.
God put it in their hearts to fulfil His will; the woman is 'that great city, which reigneth over the kings.' God's purpose. Even rebels serve His ends.
